architectReview.evidence: 3-lane architect review (subagent 13-FinalReview): 0 CRITICAL/HIGH, 1 MEDIUM (REST/MCP destructive asymmetry vs THREAT-MODEL #4). Fix applied (REST denies DELETE/PATCH on non-personal banks). Re-review (14-ReReview): architecture=CLEAR product=CLEAR code=CLEAR recommendation=APPROVE blockers=[].

executorQa.evidence: Live verify-all 7/7 GREEN exit 0 vs real Hindsight v0.8.3 (offline LLM=none): health, bank provision, retain->recall roundtrip, tenant isolation + team-retain attribution forgery-overwrite round-trip, adversarial inputs, contract-drift data-layer isolation, backup->restore DR. 26 gateway pytest GREEN. ./bootstrap unattended exit 0. Audit log: SHA-256 token fingerprints (no plaintext) + attempted-vs-resolved bank per allow/deny.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: gateway HTTP API (REST /v1 + MCP /mcp) — the product surface enforcing isolation
surfaceEvidence.invocation: verify/*.sh drive curl through host gateway 127.0.0.1:8888; gateway forwards to hindsight with ACL+attribution

surfaceEvidence.reason: verify-all/bootstrap are the verification harness, not the product surface; the behavior under test is the gateway HTTP API (s-api). Their outputs are captured as API-surface real-file artifacts (verify-all.out).

adversarialCases.scenario: alice token requests personal-bob bank via gateway
no token / unknown token to gateway
client sets metadata.hc_member=bob on team retain
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: overwritten to token identity alice; recall shows alice not bob

adversarialCases.scenario: alice DELETE on shared team-eng bank

iteration.evidence: MEDIUM finding #1 resolved + LOWs fixed; full loop rerun cleanly (26 pytest GREEN, verify-all 7/7 GREEN exit 0).
